info.description: WARNING: PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE INSTALLING. This driver IS NOT REQUIRED to send ebooks to your Kobo device - Calibre already includes a Kobo driver. DO NOT INSTALL this driver if you do not know what metaguiding is and how it works and if your intention is not to explicitly use metaguiding on your Kobo device. For more information, visit https://go.hugobatista.com/gh/intellireading-calibre-plugins or https://go.hugobatista.com/intellireading . This driver will metaguide ANY epub/kepub file you send to the device, by modifying its content and adding additional markup to the text, like bold tags, eventually improving your reading experience, your focus and reading speed (sometimes called bionic reading).
info.name: KoboTouch - Metaguide Driver (intellireading)
